title: Audit the undocumented SimpleBondV4 ABI surface
description: Identify every public or external function, generated getter, event, and custom error in contracts/SimpleBondV4.sol that is missing NatSpec entirely or is missing required @param/@return tags.

title: Add NatSpec to SimpleBondV4 functions and generated getters
description: Document the public getter surface for nextBondId, bonds, challenges, judges, and judgeMinFees, and complete missing function NatSpec on createBond, withdrawBond, claimTimeout, getChallengeCount, getChallenge, getJudgeMinFee, rulingWindowStart, and rulingDeadline.

title: Add NatSpec to SimpleBondV4 events and custom errors
description: Document the InsufficientChallengeAmount error and the currently undocumented events, including both BondCreated overloads so generated interface docs distinguish the verbose and short-form emissions clearly.

title: Compile after the SimpleBondV4 documentation pass
description: Run a compile pass after the NatSpec-only changes to confirm contracts/SimpleBondV4.sol still builds cleanly and that the documentation patch did not alter signatures or behavior.
